name: plataforma-aut
description: Marketplace de anúncios de automóveis — monorepo (Next.js + FastAPI)

scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn src.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.typecheck:api: cd apps/api && uv run mypy src
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run lint:api && npm run typecheck:api && npm run test:api
